name: Wikipedia
description: Encyclopedic style inspired by Wikipedia articles.

preview.sampleText: Encyclopedic knowledge in a familiar, trusted format.

classes.h1: text-3xl font-normal mb-4 text-gray-900 border-b border-gray-300 pb-1
classes.h2: text-2xl font-normal mb-3 text-gray-900 border-b border-gray-300 pb-1
classes.img: max-w-full my-4 border border-gray-300 p-1 bg-gray-50
classes.th: border border-gray-300 p-2 bg-blue-100 font-bold text-gray-900 text-left
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-blue-400 pl-4 my-4 text-gray-700 bg-blue-50 py-2 rounded-r italic
classes.code: bg-gray-100 px-1 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-gray-800 border border-gray-200
classes.pre: bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded overflow-x-auto border border-gray-200
